title: Alinea Anvil Mod
description: A mod needed to have Anvils work properly client-side on the Alinea SMP.
body:
# Alinea Anvil Mod

This mod makes you able to combine otherwise “too-expensive” enchantments on the [Alinea SMP](https://alinea.gg/). See the gallary for the modification in action.

**This modification only works on the Alinea SMP.**

It has no dependencies; you just require the fabric loader.
